title: Re-Creatures
description: My personal vision for Minecraft mobs. A little realism, a little fantasy, and a lot of the Adjustify vibe.
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dayyan-Zero/Re-Creatures/refs/heads/main/external/banner.png) ## About Re-Creatures is my personal vision for Minecraft mobs. The aim is to bring a little realism for the animals, and a more fantasy vibe for the monsters, all while following my [Adjustify](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/adjustify/) vanilla-plus-ish style. Changes go from the smallest texture and model changes like the squid, all the way to full overhauls like the cats. And some, like the villagers and iron golems, have a little bit of everything. You may even encounter "new mobs" like the pigmen farming away in a village. ## Screenshots ![screenshots_image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dayyan-Zero/Re-Creatures/refs/heads/main/external/screenshots.png) ## Dependencies * [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) **OR** * [EMF - Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF - Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ## Additional Addons * RC x FA Addon **(WORK IN PROGRESS)** ## Contributing If you'd like to contribute to the development of Re-Creatures, visit the project's [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Dayyan-Zero/Re-Creatures). ## License and Use

This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

A **lot** of work goes into Resource Packs. Please respect the wishes of the authors, and consult with them before taking any action concerning their work. Thank you kindly.
